user_story: As an HR admin, I want to indicate whether the organization supports Feedback / Grievance, so that the receiver configuration applies only when enabled
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Feedback / Grievance Receivers screen; When I set "Do you support Feedback / Grievance?" to Yes; Then the non-anonymous receiver configuration becomes applicable

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to indicate whether Anonymous Feedback / Grievance is supported, so that anonymous receiver settings apply only when enabled
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Feedback / Grievance Receivers screen; When I set "Do you support Anonymous Feedback / Grievance?" to Yes; Then the anonymous receiver configuration becomes applicable

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to assign applicable roles as non-anonymous feedback / grievance receivers, so that the right people receive submitted feedback
acceptance_criteria: Given anonymous support is not required; When I select applicable roles for Non Anonymous Feedback / Grievance Receiver(s); Then those roles are set to receive feedback / grievance

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to assign applicable roles as anonymous feedback / grievance receivers, so that anonymous submissions route to the correct recipients
acceptance_criteria: Given anonymous support is enabled; When I select applicable roles for Anonymous Feedback / Grievance Receivers; Then those roles receive anonymous feedback / grievance

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to move roles between available and selected lists, so that I can precisely manage which roles are receivers
acceptance_criteria: Given the role selection lists are shown; When I use the >>, >, <, and << controls; Then roles move between available and selected lists accordingly

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to set a reminder to the approver after a number of days of receiving feedback / grievance, so that approvers act in a timely manner
acceptance_criteria: Given I am configuring receivers; When I enter a value for "Reminder to the approver after" days; Then approvers are reminded after that many days of receiving feedback / grievance

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to set a reminder to the feedback coordinator after a number of days if the approver has not acted, so that stalled items are escalated
acceptance_criteria: Given I am configuring receivers; When I enter a value for "Reminder to feedback coordinator after" days; Then the coordinator is reminded after that many days if the approver has not taken action

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save the receiver configuration, so that the settings persist and take effect
acceptance_criteria: Given I have configured receivers and reminders; When I click Save or Save & Next; Then the configuration is saved and, for Save & Next, I proceed to the next step
